channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: MobiSystems Unveils MobiOffice, A Unified Productivity Platform
item.description: MobiSystems rebrands to MobiOffice, introducing a suite of integrated productivity tools, including mobile document management and cloud storage, with affordable pricing aiming to attract a billion users worldwide.
item.dc:creator: udinmwenefosa@gmail.com (Efosa Udinmwen), TechRadar

item.title: Do you need a VPN at home? Here are 10 reasons you do
item.description: A virtual private network can help ensure your information remains security and your privacy remains intact. Kurt the CyberGuy explains.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mastering Azure management: A comparative analysis of leading cloud platforms
item.description: Azure’s growing adoption among companies leveraging cloud platforms highlights the increasing need for effective cloud resource management.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: FIFA signs Netflix to US broadcast deal for the Women’s World Cup in 2027 and 2031
item.description: The deal announced Friday is the most significant FIFA has signed with a streaming service for a major tournament. The value was not given, though international competitions in women’s soccer have struggled to draw high-value offers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Arm awaits verdict in high-stakes licensing suit against Qualcomm
item.description: Arm is waiting to see if it has won a battle over licensing of its microprocessor designs to Qualcomm that has cast doubt over the immediate future of some of the chip maker’s products.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Scholz dismisses Musk's assertion that only a far-right party can 'save' Germany
item.description: German Chancellor Olaf Scholz has dismissed an assertion by Elon Musk that only a far-right party can “save Germany.”.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Los CIO 100 Awards reconocen a Gasib con el Premio a la Innovación 2024
item.description: Una actitud innovadora es clave para las empresas que quieran estar a la vanguardia tecnológica en sus respectivos sectores.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Repsol se adhiere al Pacto por la IA de la Unión Europea
item.description: Como ya viene siendo costumbre, la inteligencia artificial (IA) no ha dejado de copar titulares recientemente. La puerta abierta por parte de las autoridades europeas de permitir que se entrenen modelos de IA con datos personales sin el consentimiento explícito del propietario ha levantado ampollas.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Amazon workers strike at multiple facilities as Teamsters seek labor contract
item.description: Workers at seven Amazon facilities went on strike Thursday, an effort by the Teamsters union to pressure the e-commerce company for a labor agreement during a key shopping period.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ireland’s AI data centers are sucking up too much of the country’s energy
item.description: Ireland is still heavily reliant on burning fossil fuels to generate electricity, despite a growing number of wind farms sprouting across the countryside. Further data center expansion threatens Ireland's goals to sharply cut planet-warming emissions.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: If Meta prevails against Apple in Europe, AI surveillance will be a feature, not a bug
item.description: Anyone using any digital device needs to wise up to a looming threat as Meta attempts to exploit the Europe Union’s continued assault against the Apple ecosystem to launch what seems to be an open season on your privacy.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Australian who falsely claimed to have invented bitcoin is found in contempt of UK court
item.description: LONDON (AP) — An Australian computer scientist who falsely claimed to be the founder of the bitcoin cryptocurrency was found Thursday to be in contempt of an order of London's High Court and was sentenced to 12 months in prison, suspended for two years.
item.dc:creator: PAN PYLAS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Elon Musk considers funding Nigel Farage's populist party, a move that could shake up UK politics
item.description: LONDON (AP) — It’s a photo that sent a tremor through British politics: Elon Musk flanked by British politician Nigel Farage and a wealthy backer, in front of a gilt-framed painting of a young Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: JILL LAWLESS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Apple complains Meta requests risk privacy in spat over EU efforts to widen access to iPhone tech
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple complained that requests from Meta Platforms for access to its operating software threaten user privacy, in a spat fueled by the European Union's intensifying efforts to get the iPhone maker to open up to products from tech rivals.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: These 5 clever mapping upstarts do what Google Maps can’t
item.description: Look, Google Maps is fine. It’s arguably even great—probably one of the most-opened apps on lots of our phones and absolutely one of the most indispensable.
item.dc:creator: JR Raphael, Fast Company

item.title: Barcelona subway recycles energy from braking into power to charge electric cars
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — The Barcelona subway grinds to a halt, the doors slide open and commuters pour out to go about their daily business. Little do they know that as they do so, a burst of energy is sent up to street level to help charge an electric car.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kazakhstan’s Carpet CCTV: Pioneering the future of AI-powered public safety
item.description: In a world where technology increasingly shapes how cities manage safety and security, Kazakhstan’s Ministry of Internal Affairs is leading the way with its groundbreaking “Carpet CCTV” project.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: EU investigates TikTok over Romanian presidential election safeguards
item.description: LONDON (AP) — European Union regulators said Tuesday they're investigating whether TikTok breached the bloc's digital rulebook by failing to deal with risks to Romania's presidential election, which has been thrown into turmoil over allegations of electoral violations and Russian meddling.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: US moves to tighten restrictions on China Telecom amid security fears
item.description: The US Commerce Department is intensifying its actions against China Telecom’s US unit over concerns that its cloud and internet services could be used to funnel American data to Beijing, according to a Reuters report.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: JavaScript is still number one – JetBrains report
item.description: JavaScript is the most-used programming language, according to JetBrains’ State of Developer Ecosystem Report 2024. But the languages with the most promising growth prospects are TypeScript, Rust, and Python, the report says.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Aerospike Vector Search adds self-healing live indexes
item.description: Real-time database provider Aerospike has updated its Aerospike Vector Search database extension for powering generative AI applications. The update offers new indexing and storage capabilities for real-time accuracy, scalability, and ease of use for developers, Aerospike said.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Senate report alleges Amazon rejected warehouse safety recommendations due to productivity concerns
item.description: At least two internal Amazon studies found a link between how quickly the online retailer's warehouse workers perform tasks and workplace injuries, but the company rejected many safety recommendations out of concern the proposed changes might reduce productivity, according to a U.S.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, NewsNation
